**Changes:**
- `apps/blog/src/lib/homeRails.ts` — new pure helpers `selectRecent` (cap 10, dated DESC + undated last by id ASC) and `selectFeatured` (strict `featured === true` gate, cap 6, date DESC + id ASC). Caps exported as named constants.
- `apps/blog/src/lib/homeRails.test.ts` — 9 unit tests covering cap behavior, sort stability, strict-boolean gate, and a static-analysis guard on index.astro's `featured.length > 0` conditional.
- `apps/blog/src/pages/index.astro` — two rails (Recent always renders with empty-state copy; Featured `<section>` omitted entirely when empty). Sidebar wire deferred to step 8 per spec.
